name: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 140,000 bonus points after spending $4,000 in first 3 months (points worth ~0.5¢ each toward IHG hotel stays)

earning_rates.notes: 26x total points per $1 at IHG Hotels & Resorts (10x from card + 6x IHG Rewards members + 10x as Platinum elite or higher)

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Free Night
annual_credits.description: Free night certificate each year (up to 40,000 points), redeemable at any IHG hotel worldwide

annual_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
annual_credits.description: Reimbursement for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application fee (once every 4 years)

other_benefits.name: Automatic Platinum Elite Status
other_benefits.description: IHG Platinum Elite status (20% bonus points, complimentary upgrades, late checkout, and more)

other_benefits.name: Fourth Night Free
other_benefits.description: Fourth night free on award stays (book 3 nights, get 4th free — automatically applied)

other_benefits.name: Points Spending Discount
other_benefits.description: 20% off when purchasing IHG points (up to 50% off on larger purchases)

notes: $99 AF is well-justified by the annual free night (up to 40K points = often $70-150 value) + Global Entry credit amortized + Platinum status. IHG hotels include Holiday Inn, Crowne Plaza, InterContinental, Kimpton, etc. The 26x earning at IHG is among the best hotel co-brand rates. The 4th night free on award stays is a valuable perk for frequent IHG guests.
